idea.title: Tiny Dice Detective
idea.hook: Solve a 6-scene case by allocating 2 stat points after each scene and beating 2d6 dice checks — 3 fails and the trail goes cold.
idea.prototype: Vanilla canvas, text overlay. 3 stats (Mind/Charm/Brawn), each 0-6. Each scene: 1-line vignette + choice of 2 dice checks. Roll 2d6+stat vs DC. Pass = clue revealed, fail = +1 fail. Allocate 2 points between scenes. Win: clear scene 6. Daily-seed scenes shareable.
idea.mutation_of: Telegram Tiny Dice Case signal (spacewolfblog/12030 - ZA/UM RPG 91% opencritic) + itch top-rated narrative cluster (Project Kat, Andromeda Six, Killer Chat)
idea.why_novel: 60-second-arc narrative-dice game — compresses Disco Elysium into a coffee-break run. Yandex word/puzzle games are mechanical; itch narrative games are long-form VNs. Nobody has shipped a sub-60s narrative-dice game on the casual portals.
idea.non_timer_pressure: 3-fail life pool + 6-scene budget + stat-point scarcity (2 points per scene to spread across 3 stats)
idea.lose_condition: Accumulate 3 failed dice checks before reaching scene 6.

sources: Telegram: spacewolfblog/12030 (Tiny Dice Case / ZA/UM RPG signal)
itch.io top-rated narrative cluster: Project Kat, Andromeda Six, Killer Chat
synthesizer_brief: Mutated-from-portal-trending: Telegram narrative signal + itch narrative cluster compressed into casual-portal scale. Distils long-form RPG dice checks into a 60-second loop suitable for Yandex/CrazyGames audience.
alternatives: Pruner's Tower — subtractive tower defense where you remove turrets each wave to satisfy council budget
Hex Tribute — losing-general hex board, bribe enemy hexes to defect with 3-coin-per-turn budget
Sausage Beam — laser-mounted sausage in ring arena, firing recoil pushes you toward the edge
Lasso Knot — reverse-Snake cowboy lasso that shortens with every catch
Council of Tiles — match-3 where you vote which color clears each turn against AI council
